CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2022 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2022 Continued To Aug-30-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Unopposed Motion And Motion For An Order Approving Settlement Of Claims Brought Pursuant To The Private Attorneys General Act Of 2004, Awarding Attorneys? Fees, Costs, General Release Payments, And Reimbursement Of Settlement Administration Expenses, And Dismissing Action With Prejudice
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Justin Lo, Esq., WORK LAWYERS PC, (424) 355-8535, justin@caworklawyer.com, for Plaintiff NATALIE RANDAZZO
BIANCA M. RODRIGUEZ, Esq., LITTLER MENDELSON, P.C., 415.433.1940, bmrodriguez@littler.com, for Defendants BCSF, INC. and JESSE HENRY

No oposition. No argument held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF NATALIE RANDAZZO'S Motion For An Order Approving Settlement Of Claims Brought Pursuant To The Private Attorneys General Act Of 2004, Awarding Attorneys' Fees, Costs, General Release Payments, And Reimbursement Of Settlement Administration Expenses, And Dismissing Action With Prejudice.

Plaintiff's "unopposed motion and motion for order approving settlement of claims brought pursuant to the private attorneys general act of 2004, awarding attorneys fees, costs, general release payments, and reimbursement of settlement administration expenses, and dismissing action with prejudice" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a separate proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and tracks the Court's ruling and proposed judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
